name: O-1 seed corpus: each fp-example record carries rule_id, is_false_positive and bootstrap_seed: true so it can feed false-positive triage
command: missing=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/fp-examples"/*/; do f="$d/examples.jsonl"; [ -s "$f" ] || continue; grep -q '"rule_id":' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); grep -q '"is_false_positive":' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); grep -q '"bootstrap_seed":true' "$f" || missing=$((missing+1)); done; [ "$missing" -eq 0 ] && echo fp_fields_present 1>&2
